summary: Spec review accepts bounded Stage 6 Core approval request, cancellation, pending/expired/blocked state, and query fixture semantics.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm typecheck`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps approval/cancellation as Core refs/status truth and excludes approval execution, true writes, submitted results, and private material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Implementation is limited to Core Run Record/query/schema/self-check and item-specific carrier.
